text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That wasn't the first time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That 2,400-meter turf race the three of us ran
right after we entered the academy—the race that
brought us together...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That wasn't the first time we raced.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You probably don't remember, but I once raced
against you...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hayahide.

text_block_list.name: Young Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The winner of the Kiddy Race is Biwa Hayahide!
Coming in second is Narita Brian! Congrats to
these two amazing sisters!
Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text: Dang it! You really are fast, Big Sis!

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I can't be losing to my little sister just yet!

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Come on, let's go home and talk about our race!
We have to get better if we wanna race in the
Twinkle Series together!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Those two sisters were incredible! I don't think
I've seen Umamusume run that fast before,
especially not at the Kiddy Race!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
If they keep it up and continue their training, I
bet we'll see great things from them in the future.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see them race in the Twinkle Series
one day!

text_block_list.name: Taishin's Mother
text_block_list.text: What's wrong, Taishin? Did you get hurt?

text_block_list.name: Young Taishin
text_block_list.text: No. I'm fine.

text_block_list.name: Taishin's Mother
text_block_list.text: That's good... Listen, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Young Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Taishin's Mother
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry you're so small... It's all my fault...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Argh. Dammit!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho's coming up. I need to get some
solo training in...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough! Hack!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Ugh, what's all that racket...)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Yeesh! How's she still speeding up?! Her time for
the last three furlongs is off the charts!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide's been in another league ever since the
end of summer camp. I wonder what's gonna
happen at the Kikuka Sho...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hayahide...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nnngh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, Taishin! Taaaiiishiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...I hear you, Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey, hey! Did you see Hayahide's run?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: She was unreeeaaal!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm not gonna lose to her after seeing that!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin? What's up?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You're looking kinda under the wea—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Wait, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Run! Run, run, run! I've gotta keep running! I'm
nowhere near ready!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(After watching Hayahide, I couldn't even
imagine myself winning. But Ticket wasn't fazed at
all!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (At this rate, I'm gonna get left behind!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Wheeze!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Cough... wheeze... Splutter!

text_block_list.name: Passerby C
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hey, are you okay?! You're all pale!

text_block_list.name: Passerby C
text_block_list.text: S-somebody call an ambulance!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (I'm gonna be the only one... left behind...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(No one will accept me... I'll be back to getting
teased like before...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh, where am I?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I was running just now... How'd I end up here?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: It doesn't matter. Just rest for now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You're kidding me, right?! The Kikuka Sho's around the corner, and you want me to rest?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

Narita Taishin must be in really bad shape
because instead of fighting back like usual, she
simply drops her shoulders in defeat.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Coming in. Ah, good to see that you're awake
now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Um, hello.

The doctor asks Narita Taishin and me a few
questions while conducting a thorough
examination on her.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
To be completely honest, I can't give you the
all-clear to race in the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?! Wh-why?! I'm not even injured!

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
That's true. You don't have any external injuries,
but our tests show indications of minor
inflammation in your respiratory system.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
I assume you've been feeling very fatigued lately?
I think it will be difficult for you to fully recover in
time for the race.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
I would go as far to say that you won't be able to
run well if you participate.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No...

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
That's my professional opinion as a doctor, but I'll
leave it up to you to make the final decision after
you talk with your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text: Now then, if you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...I'm doing it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna race in the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Please!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Please... Please don't tell me not to race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Racing is all I have. Racing and winning are
everything to me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Please, Trainer! If I can't run, then...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll be nothing!

Narita Taishin begs me with tears streaming down
her face.
And I don't have the heart to refuse her.
